title: Automation to Clear Status Columns
excerpt: I have a board that I use for a To Do List. I have three columns. A Priority column that I can tag the priority of the item, An Order column that I use to number the top 3 items to work on first. Then I have a Status col…

posts.author: WoodDesign (Gene Miller)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a board that I use for a To Do List. I have three columns. A Priority column that I can tag the priority of the item, An Order column that I use to number the top 3 items to work on first. Then I have a Status column that has the “Stuck, Working on It, and Done” Tags in it. What I like is if I mark a Status as Done, I would like to remove the Priority status and the Order status and move the item to the completed group. Any ideas?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @WoodDesign

You can do this by building a custom automation with multiple actions, like:

posts.cookedHtml: Thank you, this works. I appreciate your help.
